'''âh-v-h''' ('''kahavah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maculate|maculate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maculate|maculate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kahavah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihavah|thihavah]] || [[word:jihavah|jihavah]] || [[word:shihavah|shihavah]] || [[word:kihavah|kihavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhavah|thuthuhavah]] || [[word:jujuhavah|jujuhavah]] || [[word:shushuhavah|shushuhavah]] || [[word:kukuhavah|kukuhavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhavah|thuhavah]] || [[word:juhavah|juhavah]] || [[word:shuhavah|shuhavah]] || [[word:kuhavah|kuhavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhavah|thuhavah]] || [[word:juhavah|juhavah]] || [[word:shuhavah|shuhavah]] || [[word:kuhavah|kuhavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehavah|thehavah]] || [[word:jehavah|jehavah]] || [[word:shehavah|shehavah]] || [[word:kehavah|kehavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohavah|thothohavah]] || [[word:jojohavah|jojohavah]] || [[word:shoshohavah|shoshohavah]] || [[word:kokohavah|kokohavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohavah|thohavah]] || [[word:johavah|johavah]] || [[word:shohavah|shohavah]] || [[word:kohavah|kohavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohavah|thohavah]] || [[word:johavah|johavah]] || [[word:shohavah|shohavah]] || [[word:kohavah|kohavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhavah|thĂŠhavah]] || [[word:jĂŠhavah|jĂŠhavah]] || [[word:shĂŠhavah|shĂŠhavah]] || [[word:kĂŠhavah|kĂŠhavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahavah|thathahavah]] || [[word:jajahavah|jajahavah]] || [[word:shashahavah|shashahavah]] || [[word:kakahavah|kakahavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahavah|thahavah]] || [[word:jahavah|jahavah]] || [[word:shahavah|shahavah]] || [[word:kahavah|kahavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahavah|thahavah]] || [[word:jahavah|jahavah]] || [[word:shahavah|shahavah]] || [[word:kahavah|kahavah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahavah|shahavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahavah|goshahavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahavah|gokishahavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahavahnĂŒ|shahavahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahavahnknĂŒ|goshahavahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahavahnĂŒ|gokishahavahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahavahshĂ«|shahavahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahavahnkshĂ«|goshahavahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahavahshĂ«|gokishahavahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahavahro|shahavahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahavahnkro|goshahavahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahavahro|gokishahavahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahavahmu|shahavahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahavahnkmu|goshahavahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahavahmu|gokishahavahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahavahsher|shahavahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahavahnksher|goshahavahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahavahsher|gokishahavahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahavahng|shahavahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahavahnkng|goshahavahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahavahng|gokishahavahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahavahya|shahavahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahavahnkya|goshahavahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahavahya|gokishahavahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahavahyam|shahavahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahavahnkyam|goshahavahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahavahyam|gokishahavahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahavahnĂŒshĂ«|shahavahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahavahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahavahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahavahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahavahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahavahnĂŒro|shahavahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahavahnknĂŒro|goshahavahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahavahnĂŒro|gokishahavahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahavahnĂŒmu|shahavahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahavahnknĂŒmu|goshahavahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahavahnĂŒmu|gokishahavahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahavahshĂ«nĂŒ|shahavahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahavahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahavahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahavahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahavahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahavahshĂ«ro|shahavahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahavahnkshĂ«ro|goshahavahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahavahshĂ«ro|gokishahavahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahavahshĂ«mu|shahavahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahavahnkshĂ«mu|goshahavahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahavahshĂ«mu|gokishahavahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahavahronĂŒ|shahavahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahavahnkronĂŒ|goshahavahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahavahronĂŒ|gokishahavahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahavahroshĂ«|shahavahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahavahnkroshĂ«|goshahavahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahavahroshĂ«|gokishahavahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahavahromu|shahavahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahavahnkromu|goshahavahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahavahromu|gokishahavahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahavahmunĂŒ|shahavahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahavahnkmunĂŒ|goshahavahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahavahmunĂŒ|gokishahavahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahavahmushĂ«|shahavahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahavahnkmushĂ«|goshahavahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahavahmushĂ«|gokishahavahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahavahmuro|shahavahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahavahnkmuro|goshahavahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahavahmuro|gokishahavahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
